Commands.Description: Wait for page to fully load

Commands.Target: var API_BASE = 'http://localhost:3000'; var body = document.body ? document.body.innerText : ''; var re = /Order\s*ID\s*[:\-]?\s*([A-Z0-9]{10,})/gi; var matches = []; var m; while ((m = re.exec(body)) !== null) { if (!matches.includes(m[1])) matches.push(m[1]); } if (matches.length === 0) { return 'NO_ORDERS_FOUND'; } var orders = []; for (var i = 0; i < matches.length; i++) { var sid = matches[i]; var idx = body.indexOf(sid, i === 0 ? 0 : body.indexOf(matches[i-1]) + 10); var section = body.substring(idx, Math.min(body.length, idx + 600)); var lines = section.split(/[\n\r]+/).map(function(l){ return l.trim(); }).filter(function(l){ return l.length > 3; }); var items = []; for (var j = 0; j < lines.length; j++) { var line = lines[j]; var qm = line.match(/^(.{10,}?)\s*x\s*(\d+)\s*$/i); if (qm && items.length === 0) { items.push({ productName: qm[1].trim(), quantity: parseInt(qm[2], 10) }); break; } } if (items.length === 0) { for (var k = 0; k < lines.length; k++) { var l2 = lines[k]; if (/zus|chagee|tealive|kfc|cbtl|gigi/i.test(l2.toLowerCase()) && l2.length > 10) { items.push({ productName: l2, quantity: 1 }); break; } } } orders.push({ shopeeOrderId: sid, items: items }); } var payload = JSON.stringify({ orders: orders }); return fetch(API_BASE + '/api/shopee/ingest', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: payload }).then(function(r){ return r.json(); }).then(function(d){ return JSON.stringify(d.summary); }).catch(function(e){ return 'ERROR: ' + e.message; });
Commands.Description: Extract orders from page text and POST to API (fixed quantity bug)
